title: Junior Business Development Manager at Marathon Realty

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Marathon Realty
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Marathon Realty in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Marathon Realty:
Marathon Realty is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marathon Realty!
